caption_style: WAYS creator captions; zero non-caption text

shots.caption: Saturn has a hexagon storm
shots.visual: Cassini-style north pole view where the hexagon reads instantly

shots.voiceover: It is not a drawing. It is a real jet stream around the planet's north pole.
shots.caption: not a drawing / a real jet stream
shots.visual: NASA north polar image, no extra labels

shots.voiceover: Each side is wider than Earth.
shots.caption: each side is wider than Earth
shots.visual: scale comparison implied by Saturn limb and tiny Earth proxy only if no text

shots.voiceover: And inside it, storms keep spinning.
shots.caption: storms keep spinning inside
shots.visual: polar vortex / cloud bands rotating feel

shots.voiceover: So one of the strangest shapes in space is weather.
shots.caption: a strange shape / made of weather
